patterns_recognized: Unvalidated DOWNGRADE heuristics (flat-edge = market-priced; same-matchup single-prior-day-loss blanket rule) each missed a 10-run blowout win on 2026-07-21, directly violating the ≥70%-validated mandate — lean CONFIRM on GOLD absent a proven suppression rule.

CAP10-rescue CONFIRMs went 1-for-3 on real stakes on 2026-07-21 (SD@ATL F3=2777.6 WIN, SF@KC F3=822.2 LOSS, DET@CHC F3=1761.1 LOSS); F3>1000 alone did not cleanly separate winners; hold CAP10-rescue at minimum GOLD stake pending ≥10 cumulative rescue instances.

STL@LAA suppressed on consecutive days (2026-07-20, 2026-07-21) by CAP7 sub-0.02 band + 15pp edge ceiling despite the slate's strongest PQI and SP-edge both times — evaluate PQI>+30 combined with SP-edge>1.5 as a partial-Kelly carve-out candidate from the edge ceiling.

Model staking globally disabled (staked-tier AUC 0.48 < coin flip threshold); today's SKIP tiers partly reflect this system-level gate rather than pure signal failure — do not conflate structural SKIP with signal-driven SKIP when reviewing patterns.

SD @ ATL.reasoning: Negative edge (−12.62pp) correctly caps this pick despite a strong pre-cap signal stack (F-signal, Sale SP xERA +1.63, PQI Δ=+25.2). Stage 1/2 disagree by 0.155 — SD wins F5, ATL full game — and SD's BvP data shows Tatis (OWNER, shrunk OPS .800 vs Sale) and Machado (OWNER, shrunk OPS .880 vs Sale) have historically punished Sale, adding real F5-side risk consistent with the negative-edge read. No qualitative basis to OVERRIDE.
lessons_applied: BvP OWNER pair on opposing side reinforces SKIP

MIN @ CLE.reasoning: Weakest stack on the slate — pre-cap score=0 (grade C) with SP edge 0.46 xERA AGAINST the CLE pick (Taj Bradley marginally better than Gavin Williams, −2 score). Negative edge (−5.43pp) and confidence_downgrade=True both fire. BvP is mixed (Lee WEAK_VS, Buxton OWNER vs Williams) — insufficient to rescue a dual-signal-against grade-C stack. HARD CAP 10 independently zeros pick_prob=0.519. No basis to OVERRIDE.
lessons_applied: SP-xERA opposing pick + confidence_downgrade = reliable SKIP confirmation
BvP mixed split cannot rescue a two-signal-against grade-C stack

TB @ TOR.reasoning: Edge +0.66pp is far below the 4pp floor — well inside the stake-sizing noise band per the 2026-07-21 lesson ('treat edge near the 4pp floor as stake-sizing boundary only, not directional evidence'). Pre-cap score=1 (B−) then zeroed by CAP10 (pick_prob=0.509 in bottom bucket). Stage 1/2 disagree by 0.175 — TB's full-game thesis depends on bullpen — and BvP vs Bieber is almost entirely SMALL_SAMPLE. confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster both fire. CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: sub-4pp edge = stake-sizing noise per 2026-07-21 postgame lesson
Stage 1/2 delta 0.175 flags bullpen-dependent thesis without adequate margin

ARI @ STL.reasoning: CONFIRM rescue from CAP10 zero: pre-cap score=3 (B+) with three independent dimensions agreeing — Pfaadt SP xERA +1.13 over McGreevy, PQI Δ=−19.7 confirming ARI, F3_swing_take_gap=5165.2 (the slate's strongest F-signal and largest seen in recent archive). Edge +8.2pp sits in the valid [4,15]pp window. STL's top-2 batters (Walker WEAK_VS shrunk .624, Burleson WEAK_VS shrunk .634 vs Pfaadt) structurally support the ARI pick. Primary risk: Stage 1/2 delta 0.2612 — ARI's thesis depends on innings 6–9 with only a marginal bullpen edge (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=−0.0038). Staking globally disabled regardless.
lessons_applied: CAP10-rescue CONFIRM: three independent dimensions (SP + PQI + F3>>1000)
BvP WEAK_VS on STL top-2 vs opposing SP as rescue-confirming signal
Stage 1/2 delta 0.2612 = bullpen-dependency risk, tempers but does not block three-dim rescue

KC @ DET.reasoning: Edge −15.41pp is the most negative on the slate — market prices DET at 72.3% (fair_prob=0.723) vs model's 56.89%, a 15.4pp market-vs-model divergence indicating the market holds information the model lacks. Pre-cap score=1 (B−) rests on only F3=2465.7 and PQI Δ=+20.8 — no SP edge or additional corroboration. BvP for both sides is almost entirely NO_DATA against each SP. HARD CAP 10 fires on pick_prob=0.538. No qualitative rescue signal present; CONFIRM SKIP.
lessons_applied: large negative edge = market-vs-model divergence, market likely right
two-dimension stack (F3 + PQI only) insufficient for CAP10 rescue without SP or team-quality corroboration
NO_DATA BvP on both sides cannot rescue a marginal pre-cap B− stack
